headline: ‘I was going in circles’: How one woman got caught in a year-long struggle with Airbnb and PayPal to get her money back
summary: Teresa Santos spent a year trying to get thousands of dollars back after her Airbnb account was hacked.

raw.headline: ‘I was going in circles’: How one woman got caught in a year-long struggle with Airbnb and PayPal to get her money back

headline: My friends owe me money from 8 months ago—is it too late for me to ask? What etiquette experts say
summary: Asking for money after a long layoff can feel uncomfortable, but etiquette pros say it's not impolite to circle back with your friends who owe.

raw.headline: My friends owe me money from 8 months ago—is it too late for me to ask? What etiquette experts say
raw.summary: Asking for money after a long layoff can feel uncomfortable, but etiquette pros say it's not impolite to circle back with your friends who owe.
